trips.title: Adventure in the Alps
trips.description: A breathtaking journey through the Swiss Alps, featuring glaciers, mountain huts, and traditional Swiss culture. Suitable for intermediate hikers looking for a multi-day alpine experience.

stages.title: Arrival in Zurich
stages.description: Check-in and city tour along the Limmat river.

stages.title: Grindelwald Hike
stages.description: Full-day hike with panoramic views of the Eiger north face.

stages.title: Jungfraujoch Summit
stages.description: Visit the top of Europe at 3,454 m by cogwheel railway.

trips.title: Sahara Desert Trek
trips.description: Cross the golden dunes of the Moroccan Sahara on camelback, sleeping under a canopy of stars in a traditional Berber camp. A truly life-changing desert experience.

stages.title: Arrival in Marrakech
stages.description: Welcome dinner and orientation at a riad in the medina.

stages.title: Camel Trek to Erg Chebbi
stages.description: Two-day camel ride through the high dunes of Erg Chebbi.

stages.title: Desert Camp Night
stages.description: Overnight luxury camp under the stars with traditional music.

trips.title: Kyoto Cherry Blossom
trips.description: Discover ancient temples, bamboo groves and imperial gardens during sakura season. Walk through thousands of torii gates at Fushimi Inari and witness the geisha tradition in Gion.

stages.title: Arrival in Osaka
stages.description: Transfer to Kyoto and check-in at a traditional ryokan.

stages.title: Fushimi Inari & Arashiyama
stages.description: Full-day temple and bamboo grove tour with a tea ceremony.

stages.title: Nishiki Market & Gion
stages.description: Street food tasting and guided geisha district walk at dusk.

stages.title: Nara Day Trip
stages.description: Visit deer park and Todai-ji temple housing the giant Buddha.

trips.title: Amazon Rainforest Expedition
trips.description: Explore the unparalleled biodiversity of the Amazon basin with expert naturalist guides. Navigate black-water rivers, learn jungle survival skills, and observe nocturnal wildlife in their natural habitat.

stages.title: Arrival in Manaus
stages.description: Briefing session and gear preparation at base camp.

stages.title: River Navigation
stages.description: Multi-day boat trip through Amazon tributaries spotting pink dolphins.

stages.title: Jungle Survival Skills
stages.description: Guided deep-jungle experience: shelter building and foraging.

stages.title: Wildlife Night Walk
stages.description: Nocturnal fauna observation with headlamps and expert guide.

applications.comments: Very excited about the Alps trip!

reviews.comment: Absolutely stunning scenery. The Jungfraujoch was the highlight of the trip!
Cherry blossoms were magical. Wish we had more free time in Gion.
Sleeping under the Sahara stars was unforgettable. Highly recommend!
Great experience, well-organised. A bit expensive but worth every penny.
